message:
test(fcp-core): pin ZoneId display + ZoneKeyAlgorithm tag (zone_namespace pin)

Adds crates/fcp-core/tests/zone_namespace_display_serde_tag.rs (~118 LOC)
locking the concrete wire tokens for the zone-namespace surface.

The RFC sketch names a `ZoneNamespace` struct; the implemented fcp-core
surface exposes:

  * `ZoneId` — the zone-namespace handle (Display + parse + serde)
  * `ZoneKeyAlgorithm` — the algorithm tag carried by zone key manifests

Pin coverage:
  * Canonical `ZoneId` round-trip (Display → FromStr → equality)
  * `ZoneKeyAlgorithm` serde tag table — fixes the JSON spelling cross-
    language consumers dispatch on
  * CBOR encoding per variant (Text major type, length-prefix bytes)

Closes the open half of flywheel_connectors-6tred (Pin fcp-core
ZoneNamespace Display + serde tag).
